title: Decaloba punctata
taxonomy: Decaloba punctata belongs to the family Passifloraceae, commonly known as the passionflower family. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and relationships with other plants. The genus Decaloba is often considered a synonym for the genus Passiflora, indicating that the species may be reclassified in the future. Decaloba punctata is native to tropical regions, and its classification aligns with other tropical plants in the Passifloraceae family. The plant's classification provides valuable information for botanists and researchers studying its biology and ecology.
